name: @docuforge/desktop
description: DocuForge desktop video editing and documentary production studio
author: DocuForge

scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && wait-on tcp:5173 tcp:3847 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.start: npm run build:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.build:app: npm run build:electron -w @docuforge/desktop && npm run build -w @docuforge/web && electron-builder
